remember: Students will be able to recall the major events of the Cold War Era
Students will be able to identify the key players involved in the Cold War
Students will be able to list the consequences of the Cold War on international relations
understand: Students will be able to explain the ideological differences between the US and the USSR that led to the Cold War
Students will be able to describe the role of key leaders and events in shaping the Cold War
Students will be able to analyze the impact of the Cold War on global politics and international relations
apply: Students will be able to apply historical context to understand current international relations and global politics
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of diplomatic efforts in resolving conflicts during the Cold War Era
Students will be able to analyze the role of non-state actors in the Cold War
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the causes and consequences of the Cold War on a global scale
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of the Cold War on the development of international law and institutions
Students will be able to compare and contrast the foreign policies of key nations during the Cold War

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the emergence of the Cold War Era and its major characteristics.
To analyze the role of key leaders and events in shaping the Cold War.
To evaluate the impact of the Cold War on international relations and global politics.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the major events of the Cold War Era and identify the key players involved.
To describe the ideological differences between the US and the USSR that led to the Cold War.
To analyze the consequences of the Cold War on international relations and global politics.
